ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2004 Continued To May-24-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
John McBride, Esq. for Plaintiff Nina Marinkovich, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Gregory Bloom as follows:
Damages of $27,260.00
Prejudgment interest $5,131.00
No Attorney's fees.
Costs of $870.45
For the total of $33,261.45
Judgment signed in open court.
